trips.title: North Fork
trips.subtitle: Eden, Utah
trips.summary_short: Hilltop camp with 360° views above the North Fork River Trail. Spring runoff, rocky terrain, and Keishin slipping three times.

trips.title: Lake Blanche
trips.subtitle: Big Cottonwood Canyon, Utah
trips.summary_short: Two nights in the Twin Peaks Wilderness. Granite slabs, alpine water, bear country.

trips.title: North Fork Culter Creek
trips.subtitle: Eden, Utah
trips.summary_short: One cold night in late April. Frost in Perrin's bivy, a 5 AM fire, and Keishin keeping everyone warm.
